title: centaurea gjurasinii
intro: Centaurea gjurasinii, also known as Balkan cornflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Centaurea gjurasinii can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
